implementation_notes: Figma rejected prototype destinations nested inside the allocation boards, so Phase 10 uses transparent hotspots inside the canonical frames and top-level prototype target frames/clones on the same page.
The source visual frames remain the canonical 118 and 85 boards; Phase 10 target frames are named with the Parallax / Phase 10 Target prefix and are placed off-board.
The 118:199 mutation sequence row is intentionally display-only and has no prototype reaction.
